default_sequence.instruction: Run read-only backport preflight and identify the exact approved sequence.
If no existing backport bug is supplied, create the child backport bug and verify required BugDB fields.
Run HCM bug validation through the parent runner; remediate approved/fixable validation errors and rerun until PASS, or stop for follow-up approval when remediation is not already approved.
After approval, run the VB or ADE backport implementation path, review creation, and final status updates.
Run SeedData preflight, resolve or create the BugDB bug, and propose exact ADE/SQL/load/extract steps.
After approval, run load/extract, comparator, BugDB upload, checkin/save, OraReview, and any required validation/remediation rerun steps.
Confirm the target ADE view/transaction before state-changing ADE commands.
Read BugDB and related review/transaction context first, then propose the safest next step.
Run read-only VB/BugDB analysis in the selected ALM project and branch before any change.
After approval, create or reuse the bug-scoped ALM work branch, implement the fix, test, push, and create the ALM MR.
Validate staging/local DB inputs, create or reuse the DB link, copy related person data, and report row counts.
Translate the request into a numbered plan and ask for approval before state-changing work.
